gist.headline: Suspiciously helpful
gist.blurb: Community member voodoohop just dropped Suspicious Helper, a massive 14k+ line Discord bot powered by Pollinations. Complete with a 'Vibe Engine' web terminal, it's ready to bring some serious AI energy to your server.
gist.summary: Added 'Suspicious Helper', a comprehensive Discord bot and web terminal integration built by voodoohop, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and deploy this massive open-source Discord bot preset to bring Pollinations AI capabilities directly into their own servers.
gist.visual_concept: A playful take on 'Suspicious Helper' and 'Vibe Engine'. Polly the bee interacting with a slightly mysterious but friendly chunky robot (the bot) next to a retro terminal (the Vibe Engine).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny detective glasses, high-fiving a chunky retro robot with a glowing purple screen. A retro terminal nearby displays 'VIBE ENGINE' in pixel font. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
